name: Autoco.com, Inc.
summary: Autoco.com, Inc., through its subsidiary, GTA Auctions and Liquidations, Inc., operates a public auto and liquidation auction. The company conducts a weekly auto auction and liquidation auction. It also has another subsidiary, Variegated Ventures, Ltd., an Internet technology development company that intends to provide its services to the automotive industry in North America. The company was incorporated under the laws of the State of Minnesota in April 1998 and was formerly known as Data Acquisition Technologies, Inc. The company's principal executive offices are located in Calgary, Canada.
